title: Debtor-party-resolved record (v5.4.0 pipeline stage 2 output)
description: The output of the debtor party engine (knowledge_base/architecture/17_debtor_party_rules.md). It is a raw event record (raw_event_record.schema.json) with the 17-derived debtor identity attached: owner_name, owner_type, filer_entity, and the resolution verdict. When 17.E routing fires (expected debtor missing OR a known filer matches the proposed owner), debtor_resolution_status is REVIEW_REQUIRED, owner_name is the 17.E placeholder, and filer_entity / review_reason are populated.

raw_event_id.description: Back-reference to the raw_event_record this was resolved from.

owner_name.description: The resolved debtor / lead subject per 17.C. When debtor_resolution_status is REVIEW_REQUIRED this is the 17.E placeholder '<canonical_doc_type> against unidentified party' — never a filer name.

owner_type.description: Owner-type classification per 17.F. Precedence ENTITY > ESTATE > TRUST > INDIVIDUAL; UNKNOWN only when the name is empty or pure punctuation.

filer_entity.description: The original filer / lienholder / claimant name from the raw record (17.E). Populated whenever a filer is identifiable; MUST be non-null when debtor_resolution_status is REVIEW_REQUIRED. A known-filer pattern may appear here and ONLY here — never in owner_name (20_semantic_verification_contract.md Check 12).

debtor_resolution_status.description: The debtor party engine's own verdict. RESOLVED = a real debtor was extracted per 17.C. REVIEW_REQUIRED = 17.E routing fired. This is an inter-stage field introduced by the v5.4.0 contract: 17.E expresses the failure verdict only via parcel_resolution_status, which conflates a 17-stage outcome with a parcel-resolution-stage field — see contract finding F-1.

review_reason.description: The 17.E rule that triggered REVIEW_REQUIRED routing — e.g. 'expected_debtor_name_type TP missing' or 'known_filer_pattern match on STATE OF <*>'. Null when debtor_resolution_status is RESOLVED.

expected_debtor_name_type.description: The name_type the 17.C rule designated as the debtor source for this canonical_doc_type. Audit field; null for document-body extraction.

debtor_extraction_method.description: How owner_name was derived: from the 17.C expected name_type, from the fallback name_type, extracted from document_body_text, or REVIEW_ROUTED when 17.E fired.

parcel_resolution_status.description: 13.14.1 parcel resolution status. The debtor party engine sets this to REVIEW_REQUIRED when debtor_resolution_status is REVIEW_REQUIRED (17.E). Otherwise null at this stage — the downstream parcel-resolution stage sets RESOLVED or UNRESOLVED.

allOf.description: 17.E: a REVIEW_REQUIRED debtor verdict must carry filer_entity, review_reason, REVIEW_ROUTED extraction, and parcel_resolution_status REVIEW_REQUIRED.
A RESOLVED debtor verdict carries no review_reason and is not REVIEW_ROUTED.
